codeReview.summary: The feature satisfies its contract. The Graph swap provider now derives requests from a single exported query constant, the provider test locks the request body to that exact query, and route tests prove consumers still behave correctly when swap token metadata is absent. I found no contract gaps or blocking issues in current HEAD for this feature.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture guidance is stale for onchain behavior. It still says all onchain routes are fixture-backed even though current HEAD consumes live The Graph swap data for Ethereum trades/OHLCV when available.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/.factory/library/architecture.md says all 29 onchain routes are fixture-backed, but /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/src/modules/onchain.ts calls fetchUniswapV3PoolSwaps at live trade/ohlcv paths (e.g. around line 1237 in current HEAD).

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit 89cc8aa, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and current HEAD implementation. The swap-query/query-shape parity hardening is present and adequate; no code issues found.
